audit_items.proof_trace: The scaling logic at L168-169 exactly implements `usdPrice * 10^(PRICE_DECIMALS - feedDecimals)` for the `feedDecimals < 18` case, matching the assertion directly. Registration in `_applyFeedInfoUpdates` (L253-255) prevents `feedDecimals == 0`; feed-ID rotation (L275-280) atomically clears the old asset's decimals while redirecting the feed mapping to the new asset, ensuring no `transmit()` call can reach a zero-decimals entry. `s_dataStreamsPrice` is written only at L178 (post-scaling), with SafeCast guarding overflow.
